name: Time Trap - Hidden Objects Puzzle Game
short_description: A hidden object mystery set in a haunting post-apocalyptic town. Search detailed scenes, solve puzzles, and uncover the truth behind a journalist’s disappearance. Every shadow hides a clue.
detailed_description:
Great Update!

New collection of rewards added! Go through scenes again to try new quests and get new rewards! Collect more points - added a bonus for the speed of passing the level. Update your position in the leaderboard!


About the Game

Enter the Silence

You arrive in a town abandoned years ago, its streets overgrown and buildings crumbling under the weight of time. Somewhere in the heart of this forgotten place lies the truth behind a journalist’s disappearance — and a secret that was never meant to be seen.
As you begin to uncover what was left behind, it becomes clear that something is still watching, still waiting, deep within the quarantine zone.

Uncover a Mystery Buried in Dust and Ash

This is a story-driven mystery set in a rich post-apocalyptic world, where atmosphere is everything. Explore lifelike environments, solve layered puzzles, and slowly piece together a narrative buried beneath fear and silence. The game rewards patience, curiosity, and attention to detail. Scenes can be revisited with new objectives, revealing hidden paths and rare rewards as the story deepens.

Features

• 55 hand-crafted post-apocalyptic scenes, rich in detail and atmosphere
• 37 locations to uncover, each with their own mysteries
• An evolving set of puzzles and mini-games to challenge and surprise
• Unique, intuitive hint system — play at your own pace
• Replay scenes with new objectives and unlock rare rewards
• Fully localized in 11 languages

This town has been silent for a long time.
Now it’s your turn to listen.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian
